reviews.review_description: Settings that dont save, extremely easy to escape the map and into the vents, questionable moderators, unoriginality, etc. at least it isnt a bunch of unitypackages taped together, i hope.

developer_response.body: hey i know i shut my game down but i was just reading through the reviews and cam across this one and you said unoriginal and i just wanna say that my game is very original every game has copied me the only thing that isnt original is the mod vents and kind of horror like backrooms i understand but other than that there was nothing that wasnt my idea also the only fan games i have played is capuchin so i cant copy anything else lmao

reviews.review_description: This game is better capuchin frfr

1. I got accessed of saying the n word because a guy mimiced my voice saying the n word don’t play this it sucks
2.NO NAME YEAH YOUR NOT ALLOWED BUT CANT BAN A PERSON FOR DELETING THERE NAME TO CHANGE THERE NAME 
3. THERE IS NO GOOD PART OF IT ACTUALLY TRY MAKE YOUR GAME GOOD INSTEAD OF DOING A UPDATE THATS SO TRASH 
4. The key board it’s so hard to type anything





PLS DON’T DOWNLOAD THIS IT SUCKS

A plus I wasn’t talking so how would I say it
I love this game I love to help the community and play it all the time 5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
